title: Support Ledger Console
concept: A support diagnostics console that treats the active Playground as a ledger object: save, rename, delete, Blueprint replacement, import, export, database, logs, and file operations all append events while mutating the same protected live WordPress shell.
focus: database, logs, and transfer history prominence
stateful save and Blueprint replacement flows
flows: Save an unsaved Playground in browser storage end to end with destination choice, file-copy progress, saved row insertion, active title update, storage badge mutation, transfer event, and reset action changed to Save & Reload
Save to a local directory with folder picker cancellation, folder permission consequence, copy progress, local identity, saved row insertion, and reconnect warning distinct from browser storage

Select a Blueprint from an honestly labeled representative subset of 43, inspect JSON, validate, warn about replacing current files and database, run with progress, and update preview, path, database size, and event stream
Create or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with native chooser and replacement warning
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open/manage, rename mutation, delete confirmation, final row removal, and fallback to an Unsaved Playground

Use Site Manager settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and Blueprint bundle actions while the live shell remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch route with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip through native file chooser model with replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Folder permission cancellation and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open, manage, rename, and delete saved Playgrounds
Delete confirmation and fallback active state
Active path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, and local-directory shell states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset versus stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with URL, JSON validation, copy, download bundle, run, warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warning state
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Portability events for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
Operations ledger and transfer history for save, rename, delete, import, export, settings, files, database, and Blueprint replacement
